message:
fix: Pin base64 to >=0.21 for Engine API compatibility

Fixes #42 - Using base64 = "*" caused issues when base64 0.13.x was
resolved, which is incompatible with Engine API expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ crossterm = "*"
 dirs = "*"
 walkdir = "*"
 glob = "*"
-base64 = "*"
+base64 = ">=0.21"
 chrono = { version = "*", features = ["serde"] }
 semver = "*"
 tracing-appender = "*"
